occurrenceRemarks: stream flow below surface and on surface.  ID updated by Juan P. Ramirez San Diego State University (02/06/2024) from Atelopus sp. to Atelopus ignescens.  ID justification: Identified as this species using Peters (1973)´s key, with spiculae on the chest and posterior throat forming a ~upside down triangle shape, uniform black dorsum, flanks with large round tubercles with coni.  ID reference: Peters JA (1973) The frog genus Atelopus in Ecuador (Anura, Bufonidae). Smithsonian Contributions in Zoology 145: 1–4.
